mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_odm_suspect ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_odm_suspect WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_odm_suspect WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM tb_odm_suspect WHERE employee_name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_odm_suspect WHERE employee_name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_odm_suspect (employee_name, employee_no, department, symptoms, hazard_factor, report_date, status, doctor, remarks, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{employeeName}, #{employeeNo}, #{department}, #{symptoms}, #{hazardFactor}, #{reportDate}, #{status}, #{doctor}, #{remarks}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_odm_suspect SET employee_name = #{employeeName}, employee_no = #{employeeNo}, department = #{department}, symptoms = #{symptoms}, hazard_factor = #{hazardFactor}, report_date = #{reportDate}, status = #{status}, doctor = #{doctor}, remarks = #{remarks}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
